block_01: IQ Option offers to its traders more than a platform where they can trade and check charts and quotes. In addition to that, they get a great competitive and learning experience outside of usual trading.
block_03: Tournaments are a part of that experience. IQ Option holds both regular and unique tournaments with big prize pools. And this time it is a Halloween Tournament that is offered to traders. Even better, it is actually two tournaments!
block_04: One of them is free, so users can take part in it without the need to spend any money at all.
block_15: We’ve created a thematic landing page for Halloween tournaments, just grab its link in our Promo tab and attract more traders now:
block_18: Take notice: Tournaments are unavailable for traders from
block_20: , and it is forbidden to use that landing page there.
block_22: Promoting the tournaments is not at the top of your agenda? Don’t worry! You can still join the holiday rush and bewitch your traders using some other tools. Maybe you won’t put a magic spell on them, but a slightly spooky atmosphere is guaranteed.
block_23: So, how to bring the spirit of Halloween to your marketing campaigns? Simply use our specially-designed thematic banners. After all, good decorations can be as attractive as an interesting competition. Do you agree?
